title.en: In the next few days, Ye Tian swept everything ...

content.en:
"I'm alone in this treasure land, since it's not easy to find the Eternal Night Black Water, then lift this treasure land over, I don't believe I can't find more Eternal Night Black Water!"

In the next few days, Ye Tian swept everything in this treasure land.

Time passed slowly.

This treasure land was destroyed by Ye Tian, but he still didn't give up, but all the creatures that dared to stop him were broken into countless pieces by him.

Patches of areas were lifted by Ye Tian, and the entire treasure land was almost turned into ruins.

But Ye Tian didn't care at all, even if there was a Dao Realm coming in in the future, he couldn't find him.

A long time has passed.

Just when Ye Tian was disappointed that there could be no eternal night black water here, an unexpected surprise came.

Rumble!!!!

An area was shattered by Ye Tian, and the aura of a vein attracted Ye Tian's attention.

This is the Black Mine of Eternal Night that gave birth to the Black Water of the Eternal Night.

Moreover, this vein is very large.

It's just that the area where this vein is located is a bit special, and he didn't sense it before, otherwise he would definitely find it.

Ye Tian tore this vein apart and began to search for the black water of the eternal night.

Vein core.

A drop of black water in the eternal night was found by Ye Tian.

"Sixty-three drops of eternal night black water, make a lot of money!"

Ye Tian put away these Eternal Night Black Waters, and then directly cultivated the Fourth Sequence of Dao Rules here.

"With so much Eternal Night Black Water, there is a high probability that I will be able to raise my Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules to the realm of more than twenty percent!"

In the years that followed, Ye Tian continued to use the Eternal Night Black Water to comprehend the Fourth Sequence of Supreme Dao Rules, but he did not give up and continued to search for the Eternal Night Black Water.

However, he did not find the Black Water of the Eternal Night here.

"Forget it, finding so much Eternal Night Black Water is already a big profit!"

Ye Tian continued to refine the Eternal Night Black Water, and his cultivation strength slowly improved.

Before you know it, a long time has passed.

this day.

Ye Tian finished refining all the Eternal Night Black Water, and raised the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule to the Twenty into Six Realm, which was already very good.

Like the Su Domain Lord, he definitely didn't comprehend the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, after all, the other party even had a preliminary comprehension of the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, even if there was a way to erase the side effects of the Eternal Night Black Water, it was impossible to use the Eternal Night Black Water now, and it would definitely be kept for the fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules to be used later.

And that must be after a long time.

"This treasure land has been ruined, it's time to leave!"

Ye Tian knew that there was no Dao Realm garrison in the outside world, so he went out directly.

......

Broken Void River.

Ye Tian came out of the rift, and then prepared to return to the Winter Night Fortress with the resources on his body.

It was because of these resources that he was reluctant to let the replica body annihilate.

After some time, he managed to return to the Winter Night Fortress, only to encounter some Supreme Void Demons on the way and slaughter them casually.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian practiced very calmly, mainly to improve his cultivation and cultivate the human race, so that the human race could give birth to more supreme realms, nothing more.

In this way, the years of the 60,000 solstice era passed.

Winter Night Fortress Mansion.

The aura on Ye Tian's body suddenly skyrocketed, and he began to swallow the energy around him, and all kinds of resources turned into points and fell into his mouth one by one, which was devoured and refined by him, turning into nutrients needed for body breakthrough.

After a long time, his breath began to settle down.

"Finally breaking through to the late stage of the Sevenfold Dao Realm, it took too many resources!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, it would take him longer to break through to the late stage of the Sevenfold Dao Realm, perhaps hundreds of thousands of Dao Realms.

"Others are worried about the Supreme Dao Rules, but they are all unable to comprehend the higher Supreme Dao Rules, so they can't break through. As a result, when I came here, I was dragged down by cultivation!" Ye Tian said with a smile.

If he cultivated to reach the peak of the Sevenfold Highest Dao Realm, he would be able to directly impact the Eightfold Highest Dao Realm.

A strong person who takes the path of the strongest to the Dao only needs to comprehend the fifth sequence of supreme dao rules to impact the eightfold to the Dao realm, and now that he has comprehended the fourth sequence of supreme dao rules, he can completely impact the ninefold supreme dao realm.

......

The Supreme Void.

A small auction was held, which was attended by many official members of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, as well as deacons.

Ye Tian also came to see if there was anything good.

Here, he met Su Ya, the lord of the Su Domain, and the two said hello.

Then.

Su Ya looked at Ye Tian seriously, although it was the power of will that entered the Supreme Void, there was still something to be seen.

Su Ya found that Ye Tian seemed to be in a fog, and she couldn't see through it at all.

"Ye Domain Lord, have you comprehended the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules???

Su Ya was surprised.

"It's just a fluke!" Ye Tian admitted.

"Envy!" Su Ya said: "Although I have also obtained the Eternal Night Black Water, and I also have a way to get rid of the side effects, but the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules have only now comprehended the Yicheng Realm, and it is still extremely far from impacting and comprehending the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules." "

"As long as the Su Domain Lord keeps cultivating, he will definitely have the opportunity to comprehend the rules of the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao, and then he will be able to surpass the Ninth Rank to the Dao Realm!" Ye Tian said.

"Hopefully!"

Su Ya smiled.

Soon.

The two entered the auction hall of the Supreme Void, and the two sat together.

"Lord Ye Domain, this auction is held by an alliance elder, maybe there are some good things. Su Ya introduced.

"Which Alliance Elder?"

Ye Tian didn't know much about the alliance elders, he had only seen a few alliance elders, and he had only watched from afar, and had not communicated face-to-face.

"It's Alliance Elder Gu Yang, this Alliance Elder is the most active among the many Alliance Elders. Su Ya said.

"I see!"

Ye Tian had heard of Elder Gu Yang, his strength was not weak, and he was probably in the middle rank among the alliance elders.

Although the auction was held by Elder Gu Yang, Elder Gu Yang would not personally supervise this auction, let alone appear at the auction, this could only be regarded as his inheritance.

After all, what kind of identity is the elder of the alliance, and the mere ninefold to the Dao realm is an ant in the eyes of others.

It didn't take long for the auction to begin.

Soon, one precious auction item after another was presented to the stage, and one of the official members was bidding on it.

And the auction can only use Eternal Solstice Gold as currency, this thing is made of an incomparably tough stone Eternal Solstice Stone, coupled with the fourth sequence of Supreme Dao rules, Eternal Solstice Gold Coin has always been revealed by the Alliance, and is recognized as the only currency within the Innate Origin Alliance.

Moreover, the Eternal Supreme Golden Stone itself can be used to refine the Nine Patterns Supreme Dao Weapon, so this currency has a high value and is recognized by all official members.
